chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3719 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْمُعَلَّى بْنِ خُنَيْسٍ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : رَآنِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ قَدْ تَأَخَّرْتُ عَنِ اَلسُّوقِ فَقَالَ لِي "اُغْدُ إِلَى عِزِّكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3719 - It is narrated from Al-Mu'alla ibn Khunays that he said:
Abu Abdillah (as) saw me when I had delayed going to the market, so Imam (as) said to me,
"Go early to your source of honor."
